# Pull Request Checklist

<!-- 这是一个 sample，文件实质完成后删掉这行注释 -->

## Change category

- [ ] Source corpus or rights record
- [ ] Source-author research
- [ ] Source-author model
- [ ] Derived-author persona or lineage
- [ ] Harness, schema, runbook, skill, or runtime
- [ ] Work item or review
- [ ] Approved publication
- [ ] Automation or tests

## Required checks

- [ ] Evidence identifiers are present for research changes.
- [ ] Lineage and derivation records are updated for persona changes.
- [ ] Schemas, examples, and tests agree.
- [ ] Publication gates are satisfied where applicable.
- [ ] Repository validation and tests pass.
